title: Dalkash ale
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dalkash ale''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]], enjoyed by the [[Liann]]. It was often consumed with [[fish stick]]s, [[Bubble Bowl]]s of [[Vegeparsine]] and [[Choya bread]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]''

[[Category:Ales]]
